basic_details.job_title: DCPU Munger Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Munger (DCPU Munger)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Munger (DCPU Munger) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 10 Support Person Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 07-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate in any discipline with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling along with 3 years experience
qualification.details: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate in any discipline with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling along with 3 years experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Munger Support Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://munger.nic.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Munger Support Person Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Munger Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Munger Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Munger Support Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://munger.nic.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Munger Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Munger Support Person recruitment is 07-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Support Person post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post Graduate degree in Social Work, Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, or Law, or a Graduate degree with a Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling and 3 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Support Person position is between 30 to 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 9000 per case.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DCPU Munger Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCPU Munger, which is https://munger.nic.in/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 10/विविध पॉक्सो-26/2025-748.
